query: SELECT id, customerName, arrUsd, notes FROM deals WHERE customerName IN ('Recknagel', 'Apollo', 'Apollo Precision') OR notes LIKE '%EUR%' OR notes LIKE '%GBP%' OR notes LIKE '%€%' OR notes LIKE '%£%'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ELZY9nPkashd2p.root --database gAuoMoig6vkmXbQaeq6Bo3 --execute SELECT id, customerName, arrUsd, notes FROM deals WHERE customerName IN ('Recknagel', 'Apollo', 'Apollo Precision') OR notes LIKE '%EUR%' OR notes LIKE '%GBP%' OR notes LIKE '%€%' OR notes LIKE '%£%'
